headline: D.R. Horton (DHI) Faces New Questions As Forestar Cash Burn Raises Land Pipeline Risk
summary: Forestar Group, the majority-owned land development subsidiary of D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI), is facing higher risk tied to weak revenue growth and ongoing cash burn. Forestar's role in sourcing and developing lots for D.R. Horton links its financial health directly to the homebuilder's future land pipeline. Concerns around Forestar's cash usage raise questions about potential pressure on funding, land availability, and project timing for D.R. Horton. D.R. Horton is one of the largest...

headline: 10 U.S. metro areas where builders are slashing prices on new homes
summary: Existing-home prices just hit a new record high — but there are plenty of newly built homes selling at a discount, as desperate builders cut prices.
